programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.desc: Documentary featuring exclusive interviews, obscure footage and seldom seen photographs.

programme.title: James Taylor - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas; the festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Tom Petty & The Heartbreakers - Live at Soundstage
programme.desc: Filmed live from the Vic Theatre, Chicago, Illinois, USA in April 2003 for the 'Soundstage' TV series.

programme.title: Annie Lennox - An Evening of Nostalgia
programme.desc: An Evening Of Nostalgia with Annie Lennox captures one of music's most popular and acclaimed artists in her only full concert performance of songs from her Grammy-nominated Nostalgia album.

programme.title: Usher - Omg Tour (Live from London)
programme.desc: Treating the crowd at London's O2 Arena to his signature brand of R&B infused pop, Usher performed hits from recent albums Versus and Raymond V. Raymond, including DJ Got Us Falling in Love, There Goes My Baby, and OMG.

programme.title: Chic: Live in London 2013
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Uprising Live !
programme.desc: This live show from Dortmund's Westfalenhalle was filmed on June 13th 1980, featuring Bob Marley on superb form. Marley's energetic, charismatic performance includes I Shot The Sheriff, Get Up, Stand Up and No Woman, No Cry and the film has been subs...

programme.title: J Balvin - Bruuttal
programme.desc: J. Balvin returns to his hometown of Medellín, Colombia to perform a special anniversary concert entitled BRUUTTAL. A musical journey that begins with his early songs and ends with his most recent, multi-platinum album, Energía.

programme.title: Tupac Shakur: Before I Wake
programme.desc: A look back on Tupac's final years through the eyes of Rap legends "Eazy-E", Russell Simmons and Tupac's personal bodyguard, Frank Alexander. Featuring never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: Where We're From: Rise Of L.A. Underground Hip Hop
programme.desc: WHERE WE'RE FROM captures the rise of underground Hip Hop in Los Angeles during the 90s and 2000s.

programme.title: The Temptations
programme.desc: The true story behind the legendary Motown musical sensation is brought to life in this touching miniseries.

programme.title: The Temptations
programme.desc: The true story behind the legendary Motown musical sensation is brought to life in this touching miniseries.

programme.title: Tupac Vs.
programme.desc: Tupac Shakur remains a controversial and misunderstood figure long after the shooting that ended his life. Featuring an in-depth, never before seen 1995 interview, rare footage and stills, interviews from manager Leila Steinberg and more.

programme.title: Whitney Houston: We Will Always Love You
programme.desc: In this film we pay tribute to one of the worlds most loved and best selling music artists of all time. Whitney Elizabeth Houston first showed the vocal range and star quality at the tender age of 11.

programme.title: Will.I.Am: The Way I Am
programme.desc: The complete life story of songwriter, producer and entrepreneur- Will.I.Am. From “being raised in the ghetto’ to forming The Black Eyed Peas, everything Will.I.Am touches turns to gold. He has dabbled in fashion, technology, acting and business.

programme.title: The Music of Duke Ellington and Lionel Hampton
programme.desc: This program features rare footage of the two jazz greats that captures not only the glory of their music, but also the enthusiasm and charisma that have made these two musicians into legends.

programme.title: The Legendary Barry White
programme.desc: Recorded live in Belgium, Barry White was a regular in the Top Twenty in the 1970s with hit after hit featuring lush strings over his amazing bass voice.

programme.title: B.B. King - Life Of Riley
programme.desc: Narrated by Morgan Freeman, this visually stunning film has an contributions by Bono, Eric Clapton, Bruce Willis, Bonnie Raitt, Dr. John and Keith Richards, as well as appearances by Mick Jagger and President Obama.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: As the night settles over a rocky coast, Bob Ross gives you a warm glow still in the sky - a painting achieved on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins paints an evening thunderstorm that calls back to Bob Ross's final episode of The Joy of Painting for inspiration.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross finds a barely visible lake being hugged by snowy mountains and some of nature's finest greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join artist Bob Ross under turbulent skies as the windy waves rush to crash upon the rocks - all within a pleasing oval shape

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drink in the breathtaking beauty of spectacular cascades deep in the timberland. Bob Ross invites you create this astonishing scenic display.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an old weathered dwelling today, burrowed deep in the snow and lined with protective evergreens.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Out of nowhere appears an unexpected find -- a weathered cottage in the deep forest that Bob Ross places there, in an already perfect setting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uncovers the extraordinary loveliness of nature, reflected in the mirror surface of a lake in front of a mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Breaking the silence of a misty morning is a rippling brook through the forest. Join Bob Ross as he takes you to this favorite escape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The soft sky and snow-blanketed ground give this cozy barn a quiet place to sleep and dream a while; Bob Ross's paintbrushes make it happen.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Envision yourself in a world of purple mountain tops and glistening waters that reflect the glowing sky; a magical Bob Ross scene!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A cool blue waterway winds effortlessly from the faraway high peaks and evergreens; enjoy today's Bob Ross landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a moment in time as the sea finds itself in one of nature's sudden cloudbursts; experience another oval masterpiece!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Lovely soft colors flow from the magnificent brushes of Bob Ross in this lovely warm winter painting … don't miss seeing this pretty scene unfold.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Capture an oval vision of tranquility in the forest with Bob Ross; discover a happy waterfall as it empties into a shallow stony stream.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Snowy peaks point toward the heavens as Bob Ross surrounds all of this with a happy gathering of landscape finery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Warm light in the sky and clouds makes this a glowing, fiery landscape -- Bob Ross teaches the use of his technique on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An immense ice-draped mountain is Bob Ross's main focus, with grass-covered sloping hills and chipper waterfall too!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Breathtaking skies, bending palms, and waves accentuate the cool night breeze. A one-of-a-kind masterpiece by Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest painter Steve Ross uses lots of color in this stirring depiction of giant peaks behind foothills opening onto a smooth lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Towering mountains protect a lovely green river land, where gentle waters flow and silent breezes blow - another Bob Ross masterpiece to cherish.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Paint along with Nicholas Hankins as we explore an expansive view of a Bob Ross snow capped mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Imagine the peace and serenity of a home in the hollow, sheltered from the snow-covered mountains beyond! Travel with Bob Ross to just such a place.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enter into the realm of the far north with Bob Ross and view first-hand the glory of a cold, cold snow-blanketed wintertime landscape scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us home to the farm -- a big red barn and a long rickety wooden fence - capturing our very vivid childhood memories.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real viewer favorite! With silky shades pink, mauve and lilac, Bob Ross completes an amazing birch tree landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The splendor of fall is produced by Bob Ross's red, orange and brown grasses and foliage, softly complimenting a rugged little shed.

programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.
